title: Elbaf’s Hidden Corners
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Robin, Unknown person #2, Gerd, Unknown person #3, Loki as The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.
scene: The Straw Hats explore Elbaf’s strange giant-scale spaces while children, teachers, and old legends point toward the island’s deeper mysteries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Y'all, wait!! Stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YLVA!! Magu!! Ronja!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They really are sleepwalkin'...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this white cloth?! where are you kids goin'?!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Careful, Saul!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that teacher warned us not to touch them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The one that was covered in blood?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It doesn't look like there's anything nearby...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we can't let them keep walking like this, it's dangerous...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's just get 'em back to the sci--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GWAAM!!! It hurts!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: What the--?! Saul?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What Happened?! did something stab you?!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: I'm calling from the Walrus School!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All our students just suddenly fell into a deep sleep!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And nine of them are walking away... but they're still unconscious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Western Village

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We have no idea what's causing this!!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: The school children?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: My kid is there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's not all!! mysterious beasts have emerged from the forest!!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: monsters?! Are those likes gonna be okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The kids were heading towards the eighth branch...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: TELEDICTION SNALL (ONLY used within Elbaf)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All this on top of a fire?! This is so sudden... are they gonna be okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's going on over there?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Exploration through 28 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
